item.title: Telegram API base URL hardcoded in 3 files despite TELEGRAM_API_BASE constant existing
item.intent: No Telegram API base URL literal appears in runtime code. All three callers import TELEGRAM_API_BASE from config/defaults.ts.
item.description: The Telegram API base URL 'https://api.telegram.org' is hardcoded as a string literal in three files even though TELEGRAM_API_BASE is already defined in src/config/defaults.ts (added by BUG-030). Locations: src/build/launcher/connect.ts:22 (const TELEGRAM_API = 'https://api.telegram.org'), src/evolve/approval/telegram.ts:118,142 (inline template literals), src/operate/monitor/notify.ts:67 (inline template literal). These files know about other constants from defaults.ts but skip TELEGRAM_API_BASE. Steps: (1) verify TELEGRAM_API_BASE is exported from src/config/defaults.ts (should be from BUG-030); (2) import TELEGRAM_API_BASE in connect.ts, telegram.ts, notify.ts; (3) replace local const TELEGRAM_API and inline literals with the constant; (4) run build/, evolve/, and operate/ tests. Scope: 4 files, ~6 lines changed. Pattern: BUG-025 (Ollama URL), BUG-030 (API base URLs).
